/CAL: DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT BRANDON LUGAR APPEARING/3000ADM/X:ADMITS VIOLATION #1,#2 AND #3/3000REIN/PAJ: 84 DAYS/CTORD:THERE IS NO TIME LOST ON PAROLE DUE TO THE ADMISSION OF THIS     VIOLATION/X: PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 35 DAYS,/4019HALF/X: REMAINDER OF VIOLATIONS ARE DISMISSED/  /X: PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOWINSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/
